name: inspect_urls
description: Run Google Search Console's URL Inspection on up to 10 URLs of the connected property: index/coverage state, last crawl time, Google-selected vs declared canonical, and mobile/rich-results verdicts. Use it to answer 'is this page indexed? why not?'. Per-URL failures are reported inline. Read-only and free (no credits).

projectId.description: Required. The OpenSEO project ID to scope this call to. Get one from list_projects.

urls.description: 1–10 absolute URLs to inspect. Each must belong to the connected property.

languageCode.description: BCP-47 language for the inspection result (e.g. 'en-US').
